steps.title: Use the input x = 0
steps.content: The function is $h(x)=x+b$, and the given value is $h(0)=18$. Substitute $x=0$: $$h(0)=0+b=b.$$

steps.title: Read off b
steps.content: Because $h(0)=b$ and the problem says $h(0)=18$, the constant must be $b=18$.

steps.title: Check by substitution
steps.content: With $b=18$, the function is $h(x)=x+18$. Then $h(0)=0+18=18$, exactly matching the given condition. The answer is 18.
